name: logicmonitor
label: LogicMonitor
description: LogicMonitor is a SaaS-based performance monitoring platform that provides full visibility into complex, hybrid infrastructures, offering granular performance monitoring and actionable data and insights. This connector enables automated operations such as Get Alert List, Get Device Group List, Get Device List, Get Device Alerts, Get Report List, and Get Report by ID.

fields.name: token
fields.title: Bearer Token
fields.description: Specify the bearer token to authenticate LogicMonitor REST API. Refer: https://www.logicmonitor.com/support/adding-a-bearer-token

fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is set to True.

operations.title: Get Alert List
operations.description: Retrieve a list of alerts from LogicMonitor based on the input parameters you have specified.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.title: Filter Criteria
parameters.description: Specify a filter for the results.
parameters.tooltip: Filter criteria for the results.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.title: Fields to Retrieve
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.
parameters.tooltip: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: size
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. A maximum of 1000 records can be retrieved per request.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. A maximum of 1000 records can be retrieved per request.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The maximum offset allowed is 10,000 alerts.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The maximum offset allowed is 10,000 alerts.

operations.title: Get Device Alerts
operations.description: Retrieve alerts for a specific device from LogicMonitor based on the input parameters you have specified.

parameters.name: id
parameters.title: Device ID
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the device to retrieve alerts.
parameters.tooltip: The ID of the device to retrieve alerts for.

parameters.description: Specify the start time for the query.

parameters.title: Need Message

parameters.tooltip: Set to true to include message details.

parameters.tooltip: Default is 'instances'.
